entry.title: Buying stocks or better not!
entry.summary: Using pandas and yahoo finance to plot stock data. As someone how likes to lose money on the stock market, Im always looking for ways to make it happend faster. I just found out about the yahoo finance library for python. Going to start by importing said yahoo library import yfinance as yf import pandas as pd It works like this. You resquest the infomartion from a ticker with start and the...

entry.title: Where is my money going.
entry.summary: Where is my money going. I think I have been spending a lot of my money on Amazon but I am not sure, lets take a look. Going to start by importing the libraries im going to use. import pandas as pd import matplotlib.pyplot as plt Read File and rename Colums to something easier to read. bank = pd.read_excel('excel.xlsx') colums=['Date', 'Description', 'Deposits','Price'] bank.columns=colums...
